### Salesforce Marketing Cloud

Legacy Marketing Platform

Salesforce Marketing Cloud is a digital marketing platform that helps brands manage customer engagement across email, mobile, and more. Its suite of separate tools enables segmentation, automation, and personalization, though setup and execution often require technical resources. Brands use SFMC to connect data and deliver campaigns across the customer journey.

## The Difference is in the Details

### Launch Faster

Let your marketers enjoy stress-free, self-serve campaign launches across all channels—personalized email, SMS, in-app, web, and OTT messages—with intuitive tools that mean no engineering required.

### Boost Conversions and Save Time

Save time building with our prompt-based AI journey creation tool and write messages faster with AI-generated copy suggestions.

### Personalize With Data From Anywhere

Iterable’s NoSQL foundation and comprehensive toolkit enables you to ingest 1st-party data from any source and hassle-free platform migrations without the burden of restructuring data.
